query:
INSERT INTO storeItems (name, category, thumbnailUrl, thumbnailKey, description, personalPriceUSD, commercialPriceUSD, personalPriceCNY, commercialPriceCNY, polyCount, textureTypes, fileFormat, fileSize, image2Url, image2Key, image3Url, image3Key, artistName) VALUES
(
  'Fantasy Male 1',
  'clothing',

  'M_fant1_Rendercam_42f1ecde.png',

  'M_fant1_Rendercam_002_bda20ca5.png',
  'Reblika'
),
(
  'Female Warrior 1',
  'clothing',
  'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663044718178/iq22PtDDLnfa9zucwBEcgk/armor_f0ad9df1.jpg',
  'armor_f0ad9df1.jpg',
  'A battle-hardened female warrior armor set. Features a steel breastplate with teal underlayer, leather utility belt with pouches, articulated knee guards, and rugged leather boots. Optimized for real-time Unity applications.',
  8.00,
  35.00,
  58.00,
  252.00,
  20500,
